---
title: Convert Pancreas Trajectory to RDS
---

Read the processed h5ad and save as an RDS for use in R workflows.

```{r}
library(anndataR)
library(fs)

data_dir <- "../data"

sce <- read_h5ad(path(data_dir, "bastidas_ponce_etal.h5ad"))
saveRDS(sce, path(data_dir, "bastidas_ponce_etal.rds"))

sce <- read_h5ad(path(data_dir, "example_sce.h5ad"))
saveRDS(sce, path(data_dir, "example_sce.rds"))
```
